name: Dr Funmi Obembe
role: Head of School of Technology at University of Northampton
quote: NN1 Dev Club has had a tremendous positive impact on our students who have engaged with the meetups. It has given them valuable opportunities to connect with local developers, hear directly from people working in industry. This kind of local, accessible industry engagement is incredibly valuable, and we are grateful for the role NN1 Dev Club is playing.
